problem id: 873b8ea2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  11100101 -> 11110010
  10000100 -> 01000010
  01111111 -> 10111111
  11101101 -> 11110110
  01001111 -> 10100111
  10111010 -> 01011101
  01001001 -> 10100100
  10011111 -> 11001111
  01110100 -> 00111010
  10110011 -> 11011001

query: 11100100
predicted answer: 01110010
